title: Databases module (MySQL/MariaDB/PostgreSQL/Redis/MongoDB) + v0.3 carry-over
openQuestions: Q1 — Native vs container as default per engine?
Q2 — Where do DB data dirs live? /opt/dinopanel/databases/<engine>/<instance>/ + bind-mount vs named volume?
Q3 — Credential surfacing: generate on install / always plaintext / SecretsService?
Q4 — SecretsService design: per-secret AES-GCM with master key in DATA_DIR/.secret-key, or derive from JWT_SECRET?
Q5 — PMM integration depth: stay on link-card (option A), or push to API summary cards (option C)?
carryOverFromV03: Drawer / Sheet primitive (replaces v0.3 inline detail panel on /websites)
UI for ACME_EMAIL (env-only → settings with env fallback)
External-conf import in reconcile (managed | external discriminator)
